datasets.name: 4987f4a9
queryLines:
SELECT
  SUM(total_flights) AS total_flights,
  SUM(route_disrupted_flights) AS route_disrupted_flights,
  SUM(cancelled_flights) AS cancelled_flights,
  
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(avg_departure_delay_minutes * operated_as_planned_flights)
        / SUM(operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    1
  ) AS avg_departure_delay_minutes,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(on_time_departures) / SUM(operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS departure_otp_15_pct,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(total_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(cancelled_flights) / SUM(total_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS cancellation_rate,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(route_disrupted_flights) / SUM(operated_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS route_disruption_rate

FROM departure_airport_hourly
WHERE (
  flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
  OR :date_range IS NULL
)
AND (
  array_contains(
    transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
    departure_airport_code
  )
  OR :airport IS NULL
)
ORDER BY total_flights DESC

datasets.name: 07fb513d
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
  g.departure_airport_code,
  CONCAT(g.departure_airport_code, ' - ', a.airport_name) AS airport_label
FROM departure_airport_hourly g
LEFT JOIN silver.airports_current a
  ON g.departure_airport_code = a.airport_code
ORDER BY g.departure_airport_code

datasets.name: b41037c2
queryLines:
SELECT
  departure_hour,

  SUM(total_flights) AS total_flights,

  SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) AS operated_as_planned_flights,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(avg_departure_delay_minutes * operated_as_planned_flights)
        / SUM(operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    1
  ) AS avg_departure_delay_minutes

FROM departure_airport_hourly
WHERE (
  flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
  OR :date_range IS NULL
)
AND (
  array_contains(
    transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
    departure_airport_code
  )
  OR :airport IS NULL
)
GROUP BY departure_hour
ORDER BY departure_hour

datasets.name: 810794e9
queryLines:
SELECT
  departure_hour,
  SUM(early_departures) AS early,
  SUM(on_time_0_15_departures) AS on_time,
  SUM(delay_15_60_departures) AS delay_15_60,
  SUM(delay_60_120_departures) AS delay_60_120,
  SUM(delay_120_plus_departures) AS delay_120_plus

FROM departure_airport_hourly
WHERE (
  flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
  OR :date_range IS NULL
)
AND (
  array_contains(
    transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
    departure_airport_code
  )
  OR :airport IS NULL
)
GROUP BY departure_hour
ORDER BY departure_hour

datasets.name: d443609b
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
  SUM(early_departures) AS early,
  SUM(on_time_0_15_departures) AS on_time,
  SUM(delay_15_60_departures) AS delay_15_60,
  SUM(delay_60_120_departures) AS delay_60_120,
  SUM(delay_120_plus_departures) AS delay_120_plus

  FROM departure_airport_hourly
  WHERE (
    flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
    OR :date_range IS NULL
  )
  AND (
    array_contains(
      transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
      departure_airport_code
    )
    OR :airport IS NULL
  )
)

SELECT 'early' AS category, early AS value FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT 'On Time (0–15 min)', on_time FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT '15–60 min', delay_15_60 FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT '60–120 min', delay_60_120 FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT '120+ min', delay_120_plus FROM base

datasets.name: 9d26ef3b
queryLines:
SELECT
  departure_hour,
  SUM(on_time_departures) AS on_time_departures,
  SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) AS operated_as_planned_flights,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(on_time_departures) / SUM(operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS departure_otp_15_pct
FROM departure_airport_hourly
WHERE (
  flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
  OR :date_range IS NULL
)
AND (
  array_contains(
    transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
    departure_airport_code
  )
  OR :airport IS NULL
)

GROUP BY
  departure_hour
ORDER BY
  departure_hour

datasets.name: 5de72e14
queryLines:
SELECT
  distance_category,

  CASE
    WHEN distance_category = 'short_haul' THEN 'Short-haul (<1500 km)'
    WHEN distance_category = 'medium_haul' THEN 'Medium-haul (1500–3500 km)'
    WHEN distance_category = 'long_haul' THEN 'Long-haul (>3500 km)'
  END AS distance_category_label,

  SUM(total_flights) AS total_flights,
  SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) AS operated_as_planned_flights,
  SUM(on_time_departures) AS on_time_departures,

  SUM(avg_departure_delay_minutes * operated_as_planned_flights) AS weighted_delay_sum,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(avg_departure_delay_minutes * operated_as_planned_flights)
        / SUM(operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    1
  ) AS avg_departure_delay_minutes,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(on_time_departures) / SUM(operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS departure_otp_15_pct

FROM airport_distance_category_daily_performance
WHERE (
  flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
  OR :date_range IS NULL
)
AND (
  array_contains(
    transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
    departure_airport_code
  )
  OR :airport IS NULL
)
GROUP BY
  distance_category

datasets.name: d149d7d7
queryLines:
SELECT
  g.departure_airport_code,
  g.arrival_airport_code,

  CONCAT(
    g.departure_airport_code,
    ' → ',
    g.arrival_airport_code
  ) AS route,

  CONCAT(
    g.departure_airport_code, ' - ', dep.airport_name,
    ' → ',
    g.arrival_airport_code, ' - ', arr.airport_name
  ) AS route_label,

  SUM(g.total_flights) AS total_flights,
  SUM(g.cancelled_flights) AS cancelled_flights,
  SUM(g.route_disrupted_flights) AS route_disrupted_flights,
  SUM(g.operated_flights) AS operated_flights,
  SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights) AS operated_as_planned_flights,
  SUM(g.on_time_departures) AS on_time_departures,
  SUM(g.on_time_arrivals) AS on_time_arrivals,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(g.avg_departure_delay_minutes * g.operated_as_planned_flights)
        / SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    1
  ) AS avg_departure_delay_minutes,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(g.avg_arrival_delay_minutes * g.operated_as_planned_flights)
        / SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    1
  ) AS avg_arrival_delay_minutes,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(g.on_time_departures) / SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS departure_otp_15_pct,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(g.on_time_arrivals) / SUM(g.operated_as_planned_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS arrival_otp_15_pct,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(g.total_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(g.cancelled_flights) / SUM(g.total_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS cancellation_rate,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(g.operated_flights) > 0 THEN
        SUM(g.route_disrupted_flights) / SUM(g.operated_flights)
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS route_disruption_rate

FROM route_daily_performance g
LEFT JOIN silver.airports_current dep
  ON g.departure_airport_code = dep.airport_code
LEFT JOIN silver.airports_current arr
  ON g.arrival_airport_code = arr.airport_code

WHERE (
  flight_date BETWEEN :date_range.min AND :date_range.max
  OR :date_range IS NULL
)
AND (
  array_contains(
    transform(:airport, x -> left(x, 3)),
    departure_airport_code
  )
  OR :airport IS NULL
)

GROUP BY
  g.departure_airport_code,
  g.arrival_airport_code,
  dep.airport_name,
  arr.airport_name

HAVING SUM(g.total_flights) >= 3

ORDER BY avg_departure_delay_minutes DESC

lines: # Airport Operational Performance Dashboard Analyze airport performance across time, flight distance, and route reliability. Identify when, where, and why operational disruptions occur.

frame.title: Departure On-Time Performance by Flight Distance
frame.description: Compares on-time performance across short-, medium-, and long-haul flights.

frame.title: Departure Delay Distribution
frame.description: Shows the distribution of departure delays across categories, highlighting the proportion of on-time and delayed flights.

frame.title: Average Departure Delay by Hour
frame.description: Shows the average delay in minutes per hour

frame.title: Hourly Departure Delay Distribution
frame.description: Displays how delay severity varies by hour of the day, revealing when severe delays are most likely to occur.

lines: ## Section 1: Airport Operation Over Time Analyze how delays, cancellations, and reliability vary throughout the day for the selected airport. Identify peak hours of congestion and operational disruption.

frame.title: Departure on Time Performance by Hour
frame.description: This Graph shows the percentage of flights being on time (up to 15 min late) per hour

lines: ## Section 2: Flight Distance Performance Analyze how operational performance differs between short-, medium-, and long-haul flights.

frame.title: Average Departure Delay by Flight Distance
frame.description: Shows how average departure delays differ across flight distance categories.

frame.title: Flight Volume Distribution by Distance Category
frame.description: Displays the number of flights in each distance category to provide context for performance comparisons.

lines: ## Section 3: Route Performance & Reliability Identify the most critical and problematic routes based on delays, cancellations, and operational disruptions.

frame.title: Routes with Highest Departure Delays
frame.description: Highlights routes with the highest average departure delays over the selected period.

frame.title: Routes with Highest Cancellation Rates
frame.description: Shows routes with the highest proportion of cancelled flights.

frame.title: Routes with Highest Departure On Time Performance
frame.description: Displays routes orderd by their On Time Performance.

frame.title: Most Frequent Routes
frame.description: Displays routes with the highest number of flights, indicating key operational corridors.

frame.title: Route Performance Overview
frame.description: Detailed view of route-level performance including delays, cancellations, disruptions, and reliability metrics.
